<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TextUI\XmlConfiguration; use DOMDocument; use DOMElement; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class MoveAttributesFromFilterWhitelistToCoverage implements Migration { /** * @throws MigrationException */ public function migrate(DOMDocument $document): void { $whitelist = $document->getElementsByTagName('whitelist')->item(0); if ($whitelist === null) { return; } $coverage = $document->getElementsByTagName('coverage')->item(0); if (!$coverage instanceof DOMElement) { throw new MigrationException('Unexpected state - No coverage element'); } $map = [ 'addUncoveredFilesFromWhitelist' => 'includeUncoveredFiles', 'processUncoveredFilesFromWhitelist' => 'processUncoveredFiles', ]; foreach ($map as $old => $new) { if (!$whitelist->hasAttribute($old)) { continue; } $coverage->setAttribute($new, $whitelist->getAttribute($old)); $whitelist->removeAttribute($old); } } }
